Python Frequency Response-based Controller Optimization

  • API Documentation
  • Examples
Python Frequency Response-based Controller Optimization
  • »
  • API Reference
  • View page source

API Reference¶

ObCD Objects/Methods¶

UiParams.get_default_i(device, rbac):

Function to extract the UI parameter default values for currentfield control.

device

str

FGC device name.

rbac

str

RBAC token needed to access the FGC properties.

Return

class object

Object which contains the UI paramater default values. See UI Parameters for the object attribute names and values.

FgcProperties.from_fgc_ib(device, rbac):

Function to extract the FGC device property values needed for current/field control. If test_select is enabled, the property values are extracted based on LOAD.TEST_SELECT. If test_select is disabled, the property values are extracted based on LOAD.SELECT.

device

str

FGC device name.

rbac

str

RBAC token needed to access the FGC properties.

Return

class object

Object which contains the FGC properties and values needed for current/field control.

FgcProperties.from_fgc_v(device, rbac):

Function to extract the FGC device property values needed for voltage control.

device

str

FGC device name.

rbac

str

RBAC token needed to access the FGC properties.

Return

class object

Object which contains the FGC properties and values needed for voltage control.

OptimizeIB(props, user_pars).model_opt():

Function to call when a model-driven design is desired for the current/field loops.

props

dict

Dictionary format of the FGC properties obtained with FgcProperties.from_fgc_ib(). Note: the dict format can be obtained with the vars Python command.

user_pars

class object

UI input parameters.

Return

dict of dict

Arrays and values resulting from the model-based optimization (RST and ILC parameters).

OptimizeIB(props, user_pars).data_opt(df):

Function to call when a data-driven design is desired for the current/field loops.

props

dict

Dictionary format of the FGC properties obtained with FgcProperties.from_fgc_ib(). Note: the dict format can be obtained with the vars Python command.

user_pars

class object

UI input parameters.

df

dataframe

Dataframe which contains the f, gain and phase arrays from the frequency response of V_REF to I/B_MEAS

Return

dict of dict

Arrays and values resulting from the data-driven optimization (RST and ILC parameters).

FRM Objects/Methods¶
